warnings: Could not resolve 'chemkit' to a SMILES from any reliable source. Tried: PubChem, OPSIN, NIST WebBook. Check the spelling, supply a SMILES string directly, or provide an .xyz file.

prose: Build attempt failed — the build-from-smiles skill could not resolve the name “chemkit” to any registered chemical identifier in PubChem, OPSIN, or the NIST WebBook, so no SMILES string and therefore no 3-D coordinates could be generated. Please provide the molecule’s SMILES string or an existing structure file so I can proceed.
